title: Analytical Applications of DEAPG as Gravimetric Reagent-I  Estimation of Hg(II)
author: R. K. UPADHYAY
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Chemistry Department, N.R.E.C. College, Khurja (U.P.) 

  Manuscript received 12 October 1979, accepted 30 December 1979  

  p -Diethylaminoanil of phenyl glyoxal (abbreviated as DEAPG) precipitates Mercury(II) quantitatively and gives dark brown complex at  p H 9.8 by adding double theoretical quantity of the ligand. It can be used for the gravimetric estimation of Hg(ll) either alone or in presence of foreign ions.
